mapper.select: SELECT * FROM department WHERE is_used = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM department WHERE branch_id = #{branchId} AND is_used = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO department (branch_id, dept_name, sort_order, is_used, apply_date, created_at) VALUES (#{branchId}, #{deptName}, IFNULL(#{sortOrder}, 1), IFNULL(#{isUsed}, 'Y'), #{applyDate}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE department SET is_used = 'N' WHERE dept_id = #{deptId}
